purpose_en: Distilled constitutional protections — clarity under restraint
distillation_note_en: Can the architecture become smaller without losing its constitutional protections?
preserved_non_negotiable_en: The system still refuses to certify itself — empty ledgers intentional.

invariants.en: Runtime observation does not imply runtime legitimacy.
Governed runtime observation is still not runtime understanding.
invariants.ar: runtime المحكوم ما يزال ليس understanding.

invariants.en: Telemetry density does not imply gameplay understanding.
invariants.ar: كثافة telemetry لا تعني فهم gameplay.

invariants.en: Replay is evidence of reproducibility, not evidence of validity.
Execution opacity preserved — pedagogical and rubric meaning remain partially opaque.
invariants.ar: opacity محفوظ — المعنى pedagogical و rubric-wise opaque جزئيًا.

invariants.en: Empty ledgers are intentional — the project refuses self-certification.

l4_clause_en: L4 may observe runtime phenomenology. L4 may not infer gameplay legitimacy.
